violations.description: Person in charge. — ---Certified food service manager had an expired certificate.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open bag of hamburger patties in freezer.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Observed side of fryer needs to be cleaned.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. -Observed acoustic ceiling tile in food prep area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed cracked and broken floor tiles in food prep area.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)

Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
